mapper.select: /* wif-das-classificationtoteassort-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasAssortResultWaveSeq - DAS Assort Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_prcsrslt_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationtoteassort-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasAssortResultOrderSeq - DAS Assort Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_prcsrslt_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationtoteassort-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasAssortResultItemSeq - DAS Assort Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_prcsrslt_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
